DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR ISSUE SANCTIONS, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY DESPITE A PRIOR ORDER TO DO SO AND HAS ALSO FAILED TO FILE ANY RESPONSE, LET ALONE OPPOSITION TO THE PENDING MOTION. ACCORDINGLY, DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES H. FLEMING, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL VERIFIED RESPONSES BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM LEON MAROTZ TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S FORM INTERROGATORIES-GENERAL, SET. NO. ONE, IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MAROTZ SHALL PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS OF BEING SERVED WITH THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER SHALL BE SERVED ON PLAINTIFF AT HIS EMAIL ADDRESS OF WILLIAM.MAROTZ@YAHOO.COM IN ADDITION TO HIS GENERAL DELIVERY ADDRESS. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: DENNIS HYDE, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative For Issue Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JAMES F. HANNAWALT, ESQ. of the Office of the City Attorney of the City and County of San Francisco, Tel No. 415-554-3800 appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative For Issue Sanctions, Plaintiff has failed to respond to discovery despite a prior order to do so and has also failed to file any response, let alone opposition to the pending motion. Accordingly, defendants' motion for terminating sanctions is granted and the case is dismissed with prejudice. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: James H. Fleming, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, the unopposed motion to compel verified responses by Plaintiff William Leon Marotz to Defendant City and County of San Francisco's FORM INTERROGATORIES-GENERAL, Set. No. One, is granted. Plaintiff Marotz shall provide complete verified responses within ten (10) days of being served with the Notice of Entry of the order. The Notice of Entry of the order shall be served on Plaintiff at his email address of william.marotz@yahoo.com in addition to his general delivery address. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-21-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar May-27-2015 Off Calendar
